subject: Exclusive offer - Discover more of what you love!
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy http://links.email.xmradio.com/ctt?kn=2&m=717852&r=OTgzMzQ2MzM2NQS2&b=2&j=NDE3NDEyMDMS1&mt=1 into your browser. 


XM Satellite Radio

**********************************************************************

Shop Our Online Store >
----------------------------------------------------------------------
http://links.email.xmradio.com/ctt?kn=5&m=717852&r=OTgzMzQ2MzM2NQS2&b=2&j=NDE3NDEyMDMS1&mt=1


======================================================================
----------------------------------------------------------------------
ADMIT IT, YOU'VE GOT A CRUSH ON US.
----------------------------------------------------------------------
======================================================================


jeffrey, now that you've discovered something you love on XM, don't 
stop listening! Your free trial has ended, but your XM experience 
doesn't have to. Keep discovering more of everything you love with XM. 

Turn it on again > 
----------------------------------------------------------------------
http://links.email.xmradio.com/ctt?kn=5&m=717852&r=OTgzMzQ2MzM2NQS2&b=2&j=NDE3NDEyMDMS1&mt=1


======================================================================

XM RADIOS FROM $29*

SAVE UP TO 60%

SUBSCRIPTION ONLY $12.95 A MONTH PLUS FREE ACTIVATION


GET XM TODAY >
----------------------------------------------------------------------
http://links.email.xmradio.com/ctt?kn=5&m=717852&r=OTgzMzQ2MzM2NQS2&b=2&j=NDE3NDEyMDMS1&mt=1


======================================================================

TAKE 5

XM 155

Ellen DeGeneres - The Ellen DeGeneres Show


======================================================================
170 CHANNELS TO FIND WHAT TURNS YOU ON
======================================================================

If you loved your online sample of 80 XM channels, you'll discover
even more to love when you subscribe to XM today. For only $12.95 a
month you'll get over 170 XM digital channels of music, sports, news,
talk and entertainment every week. 

Live musical performances and weekly shows  onstage, offstage or 
backstage, XM is your all-access pass to the music you love. 

Up-to-the-minute sports action  listen to it live, then catch the 
commentary from our all-star team of sports personalities. 

An A-list of entertainment  the biggest names with the biggest 
guests. Who's gonna pop in this week? Tune in and find out! 


======================================================================
GETTING XM IS EASY
======================================================================

1. FIND YOUR RADIO - For your car, home or on-the-go

2. PICK YOUR PLAN - Monthly, annual and family plans available 

3. ACTIVATE - Enjoy XM


GET XM TODAY >
----------------------------------------------------------------------
http://links.email.xmradio.com/ctt?kn=5&m=717852&r=OTgzMzQ2MzM2NQS2&b=2&j=NDE3NDEyMDMS1&mt=1


======================================================================
TURN A FRIEND ON TO XM
======================================================================

Don't keep all this great music and entertainment to yourself. 
Send your friend a 3-day trial of XM.


TELL A FRIEND >
----------------------------------------------------------------------
http://links.email.xmradio.com/ctt?kn=3&m=717852&r=OTgzMzQ2MzM2NQS2&b=2&j=NDE3NDEyMDMS1&mt=1

======================================================================
----------------------------------------------------------------------
======================================================================

*Nonrefundable prepayment of three (3) months of service required and 
service will renew on same payment terms after initial three (3) 
months. Subject to $65.00 early cancellation fee if six (6) months 
of continuous service is not maintained. You must be authorized to 
redeem this offer. Exclusive offer(s) cannot be combined with other 
offers, expires 12/30/07, while supplies last and is not valid in 
Canada. Other fees and programming subject to change. Subscriptions 
subject to Customer Agreement available at xmradio.com. Service only 
available in the 48 contiguous United States.
